Do you have a LinkedIn profile?

2
Without analytics, you don't know anything.

This is analytics section.

https://www.linkedin.com/in/mosh-online/
3
Don't forget to update your About section.

This is about section.

https://www.linkedin.com/in/mosh-online/
4
If you have a website, you can put it in the featured section.

And this is featured section.

https://www.linkedin.com/in/mosh-online/
5
Your number of followers and your posts and activities will show in the activity section.

And this is activity section.

https://www.linkedin.com/in/mosh-online/
